description: Port of the classic 1984 adventure game Robot Odyssey
name: @robot-odyssey-rewired/workspace

scripts.build: npm run build:engine && npm run build:cli && npm run build:web
scripts.clean: npm run clean:engine && npm run clean:cli && npm run clean:web
scripts.hotserve: npm run build:engine && cd packages/web && npm run hotserve
scripts.distserve: npm run build:engine && cd packages/web && npm run distserve
